model_specification_line: model = smf.ols("full_time ~ eligible + age + C(year)", data=sample).fit()
sample_selection: hispan == 1 (Mexican origin) and bpl == 200 (born in Mexico)
citizen in {3,4,5} (noncitizens, first papers, or unreported)
yrimmig > 0, birthyr > 0, and arrival_age between 0 and 15
